blocksUsed.structure: 2 columns, multiple rows: [image/icon | heading + description + CTA] per row
2 columns, multiple rows: [image | heading + description + CTA] per row
1 column, multiple rows: [heading + description + CTA] per row
2 columns, multiple rows: [question title | answer content] per row
2 columns per row: each cell is one column of quoted testimonial content
4 columns per row: each cell contains heading + phone/hours/CTA

rows.content: Col 1: Icon/Image | Col 2: Heading + Description + CTA link
Col 1: Large illustration image | Col 2: Heading + Description + CTA link
Col 1: Question title | Col 2: Answer content (paragraphs, lists, links)
Col 1: Quote text + attribution | Col 2: Quote text + attribution
